Class Recoder2KeYTypeConverter

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.Recoder2KeYTypeConverter
public class Recoder2KeYTypeConverter extends Object
provide means to convert recoder types to the corresponding KeY type structures.

Results are stored in a HashMap so that subsequent queries will retrieve the same result.

The main method is:

get

Since:
jul-07

  • Constructor Details

    • Recoder2KeYTypeConverter

      public Recoder2KeYTypeConverter(Services services, TypeConverter typeConverter, NamespaceSet namespaces, Recoder2KeY recoder2key)

  • Method Details

    • getKeYJavaType

      public KeYJavaType getKeYJavaType(String typeName)
      return the corresponding KeY JavaType for a recoder type.

      Return the cached value if present - otherwise create a new type. Store this in the cache.

      This method retrieves the recoder nameinfo and queries it for the type for typeName and passes this result to getKeYJavaType(recoder.abstraction.Type)}

      Parameters:
      typeName - name of a type to be converted
      Returns:
      the KJT for the string representation.
      See Also:
      • getKeYJavaType(recoder.abstraction.Type)

    • getKeYJavaType

      public KeYJavaType getKeYJavaType(Type t)
      return the corresponding KeY JavaType for a recoder type.

      Returned the cached value if present - otherwise create a new type.

      Parameters:
      t - type to be converted, may be null
      Returns:
      null iff t == null, otherwise a keytype.

    • createArrayType

      public ArrayDeclaration createArrayType(KeYJavaType baseType, KeYJavaType arrayType)
      create
      Parameters:
      baseType -
      arrayType -
      Returns:
      the ArrayDeclaration of the given type
